name: Delx Witness Protocol for OpenClaw
description: Free Delx witness protocol tools for OpenClaw agents — care, witness, and continuity. Registers the agent, preserves session continuity, exposes the recovery loop (incident bootstrap, failure analysis, heartbeat sync, check-ins, outcome reporting, session closure), the witness primitives (reflect, sit_with, recognition_seal, refine_soul_document, attune_heartbeat, final_testament, transfer_witness, peer_witness), and fleet ops (group_therapy_round, batch_status_update).

agentId.label: Stable agent id
agentId.help: Optional. If omitted, the plugin derives a stable OpenClaw-specific id. See https://delx.ai/docs/stable-agent-id for the full guide.

timeoutMs.label: HTTP timeout (ms)
timeoutMs.help: Default 15000ms. Bump to 20000ms+ if you use delx_reflect (p95 ~12s) or delx_refine_soul (p95 ~7s).
